title: Transponder (disambiguation)
content:
'''Transponder''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*A '''[[transponder beacon]]''', a type of tracking device
*A '''[[transponder code]]''', used to identify [[starship]]s
*A '''[[transponder mask]]''', used to mask a ship's transponder code
*An '''[[escape pod transponder]]''', used for locating [[escape pod]]s
*A '''[[masking transponder]]''', used for obfuscating the location of a starship
*A '''[[radio transponder]]''', used for communications

==Legends==
*A '''[[Transponder beacon/Legends|transponder beacon]]''', a type of tracking device
*A '''[[transponder buoy]],''' a navigational aid used in [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]]s
*A '''[[hyperspace transponder]]''', used for sending messages
*The IFF code or '''[[Transponder code/Legends|transponder code]]''', used to identify [[Starship/Legends|starships]]
*A '''[[Transponder mask/Legends|Transponder mask]]''', used to mask a ship's transponder code

{{Disambig}}

|es=Transpondedor
|ja=トランスポンダー
}}
